questions.subject: Direct Tax Laws
questions.question: Under section 54, exemption is primarily available on capital gains from transfer of which asset?
questions.explanation: Section 54 applies to LTCG on transfer of a residential house, subject to reinvestment conditions.

questions.subject: Indirect Tax
questions.question: ITC is blocked under GST for which expense?
questions.explanation: Section 17(5) blocks ITC on motor vehicles except in specified cases.
